---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new skill or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What skill does this relate to?**
Existing skill name, or "New skill"

**What workflow do you want?**
Describe the task you want to accomplish.

**Why is this useful?**
Who benefits and how often would this be used?

**Any relevant federal references?**
FAR citations, API documentation, etc.
